channel.title: Discover South Lake Union Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Discover South Lake Union Events

item.title: The Market Hall Egg Hunt
item.description:
Monday, March 30, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Fairview Market Hall, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

From March 30–April 3, FMH will hide one golden egg per day somewhere inside the hall.

Event details

item.title: Guest Chef Night: Chef Brendan McGill
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: FareStart Restaurant, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Please join us as we welcome Chef Brendan McGill of the Hitchcock Restaurant Group for a special evening as we celebrate our students, build...

Event details

item.title: Living Voices: Winning Her Wings
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: MOHAI, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

They flew planes. They fought prejudice. They made history.

Event details

item.title: Flat Tire Repair Workshop
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: REI, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Flat tires happen—on trails, roads, and everywhere in between.

Event details

item.title: Introduction to Hand Brooms
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Studio Forma, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Gather at Studio Forma in South Lake Union and learn to weave your own turkey wing and hawk’s tail hand broom in this introductory,...

Event details

item.title: Visiting Artist Lecture: Daisy Nam
item.description:
Friday, April 3, 2026 at 11:30 AM

Location: Raisbeck Auditorium, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

The Cornish College of the Arts Art Department is proud to present the sixth lecture of their 2025-2026 Visiting Artist Program.

Event details

item.title: 2026 Art BFA Exhibition Opening Reception
item.description:
Friday, April 3, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: 9th Ave Gallery, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

The Cornish College of the Arts at Seattle University’s Art Department is proud to present the 2026 Art BFA Exhibition

Event details

item.title: Spring Music Student Showcase
item.description:
Friday, April 3, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Raisbeck Auditorium, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Please join the Cornish College of the Arts Music Department in a special showcase featuring Cornish Music Students.

Event details

item.title: Stir Up the Paint: "Spring Has Sprung"
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Tapster, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

In Person Paint Night Event with Master Artist Kate Burke (21 and Over)

Event details

item.title: Easter Cruises
item.description:
Sunday, April 5, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Waterways Cruises & Events, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Waterways is offering two cruise options to help you celebrate Easter in style!

Event details

item.title: Trivia Nights at King Leroy
item.description:
Monday, April 6, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: King Leroy, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Gather your crew. Flex those brain muscles. Let the games begin!

Event details

item.title: Sewing Workshop: Spring Top
item.description:
Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Studio Forma, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Learn the basics of sewing in a fun environment!

Event details

item.title: SLUCC Apr Mtg: Design Review Reboot
item.description:
Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Virtual Meeting, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Event details

item.title: Out & Back with Désir: Screening & Q+A
item.description:
Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: REI, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Join Alison Mariella Désir, host of Out & Back on Cascade PBS, and Max Djenohan, elite survivalist and athlete, for a screening and Q + A.

Event details

item.title: Canto Ostinato
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: 415 on Westlake, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Pianist Erik Hall, Sandbox Percussion and UW School of Music students & faculty join ECM for Simeon ten Holt’s evening-length minimalist...

Event details

item.title: Glazer's Photography Essentials Part 1
item.description:
Saturday, April 11, 2026 at 9:30 AM

Location: Glazer's Camera, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

In our Photography Essentials Part 1 course, you will learn about the fundamentals of your camera and its capabilities.

Event details

item.title: Glazer's Photography Essentials Part 2
item.description:
Saturday, April 11, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Glazer's Camera, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

This course picks up where Photography Essentials Part 1 course wraps and dives into the following concepts.

Event details

item.title: Collectors' Gala & Auction
item.description:
Saturday, April 11, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Amazon Meeting Center, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Join Gage Academy of Art for their Collectors’ Gala & Auction: Perspective, celebrating creativity and community.

Event details

item.title: Sunday Public Sail
item.description:
Sunday, April 12, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: The Center for Wooden Boats, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

A Seattle tradition for more than 25 years!

Event details

item.title: Better Trails Club: Cheshiahud Lake Union Loop Cleanup
item.description:
Sunday, April 12, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: REI, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

item.title: History Café: Field Notes Podcast
item.description:
Wednesday, May 20, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: MOHAI, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

item.title: Photography Fundamentals with John Greengo
item.description:
Saturday, May 23, 2026 at 9:30 AM

Location: Glazer's Camera, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

The fundamentals of photography are the most important ideas and concepts you will need for success in your photographic journey.

Event details

item.title: Glazer's Video Fundamentals - Part 2
item.description:
Sunday, May 24, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Glazer's Camera, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Building on the concepts taught in Video Fundamentals Part 1, this class will round out your skill set and give you confidence in your abilities.
